title: An Act amending the home rule charter of the town of Falmouth to create the Falmouth Licensing Commission

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Vieira of Falmouth, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 5365) of David T. Vieira, Dylan A. Fernandes and Thomas W. Moakley (by vote of the town) that the town of Falmouth be authorized to amend its charter to establish the Falmouth licensing commission.  Municipalities and Regional Government.  [Local Approval Received.]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Municipalities and Regional Government

related_entities.name: the committee on Municipalities and Regional Government
committee on Municipalities and Regional Government
